issues: 1x silhouette reads as plain white rectangle — arch detail lost at native size
white center panel loses contrast on light background (bg bleed)
aesthetic is ornate/architectural rather than cute friendly-toy charm
reasoning: At 4x the asset has a distinctive gothic-arch silhouette with appealing teal mosaic and gold trim — the arch shape is instantly readable and pixel edges are clean. On dark backgrounds the teal and gold pop with good contrast. However on the light bg the white door-body bleeds into the background, costing definition. At 1x the arch collapses into a tiny white vertical bar with almost no readable personality — fails the 1x sticker test. The ornate stained-glass aesthetic has pleasant personality but leans architectural/elegant rather than the round/soft friendly-toy charm the rubric requires. Passes silhouette clarity at 4x, marginal on charm, fails 1x readability and light-bg contrast.
